steps.explanation: Start with $10yz - 9xz = 10xy - z$. Move $z$ to the left by adding $z$ to both sides: $10yz - 9xz + z = 10xy$.

• A: $z = \dfrac{10xy}{10y - 9x + 1}$ — matches our result. That matches choice A — A is correct.
  • B: Missing the $+1$ in the denominator from the $z$ term that was moved over.
  • C: $-29xy$ — does not follow from algebra.
  • D: $z = 9x$ — does not follow from the equation.
